/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/server/connection.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/protocol/resp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/storage/in_memory_storage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kv-server.dir/src/commands/handler.cpp.o" -o kv-server  -lpthread
